title: Home - Expert Care for Ear, Nose, and Throat Conditions in Mumbai
description: Get comprehensive care for ear, nose, and throat conditions from renowned ENT specialist Dr.Milind Navalakhe in India. Our experienced team offers advanced treatments for hearing loss, sinus issues, throat disorders, and more. Schedule an appointment today for personalized and compassionate care.
text:
Home - Expert Care for Ear, Nose, and Throat Conditions in Mumbai Have any questions? 022 2418 6868 info@entspecialistindia.in Home Ear Ear Microsurgery Cochlear Implants Bone Anchored Hearing Aid Surgery Vertigo Mastoidectomy Otosclerosis Nose Endoscopic Sinus Surgery(FESS) Rhinoplasty-Cosmetic Nose Surgery DCR Surgery Sinonasal Polyposis Nasal Tumours CSF Rhinorrhoea Endoscopic Oculoplastic Surgery Optic Nerve Decompression Epistaxis Endoscopic Approach to Orbital Trauma Throat Tonsillectomy Adenoid Surgery Microlaryngeal Surgery Voice Surgery Head-Neck Thyroid Surgery Salivary Gland Surgery Submandibular Gland Parotid Gland Head & Neck Cancer Surgery Sialendoscopy Oesophagoscopy Thyroglossal Cyst Neck swellings Pediatric ENT Foreign bodies in ENT Deafness In Children Tonsillectomy Adenoid Surgery Tongue Tie Audiology Audiometry Impedance Audiometry Speech Therapy Hearing Aids BERA About About us News & Media Testimonials Contact Get treatment for all your Ear Conditions View More Effective consultation and treatment for your Nose View More Perfect consultation and cure for all your Throat Conditions View More ENT Surgeon with experience of over 25+ years MBBS, Diploma in Otorhinolaryngology (DLO), FCPS - General Surgery, MS - ENT, FCPS - Oto-Rhino-Laryngology ENT/ Otorhinolaryngologist, 28 Years Experience Overall  (25 years as specialist) EAR NOSE THROAT HEAD-NECK Make an appointment Welcome to Our Clinic Prof. Dr. Milind Mohan Navalakhe is an ENT Surgeon with experience of over 28+ years & special interest in Endoscopic sinus surgery, Skull base surgery, Endoscopic Oculoplastic surgery Sialendosopy, Salivary Gland Diseases, Cochlear Implants, BAHA, Ear microsurgery. Opening hours Prof. Dr. Milind Navalakhe, MS (ENT), FCPS, DORL Monday - Friday 5 30 PM - 8 30 PM Saturday - Sunday Closed Get in touch Navalakhe ENT Clinic 505, 5th Floor, Rangoli Time Complex Premiere Cinema, Near Parel Bridge, Dr. B. Ambedkar Road, Parel (East), Mumbai - 4000012 022 2418 6868 / 02224106868 9820300167 navalakheentclinic@gmail.com See what we provide for your health Cochlear Implant (CI) A surgically implanted electronic device that provides a sense of sound to a person who is profoundly deaf. Bone anchored hearing aid (BAHA) Consists of a titanium screw that becomes osseointegrated in the skull bone behind the ear Endoscopic Sinus Surgery Minimally invasive procedure done endoscopically and does not require any external skin incision. Sialendoscopy A minimally invasive procedure in obstructive salivary gland diseases. Endoscopic Dacryocystorhinostomy (DCR) Indicated for patients diagnosed with lacrimal sac or nasolacrimal duct obstruction. Sinonasal Polyposis Non neoplastic masses of oedematous nasal or sinus mucosa. They are divided into two main varieties 
a) Bilateral ethmoid polypi.
b) Antrochonal polyp Do you want to visit our clinic? Book your appointment! Sign up for a visit A thorough professional and a gentleman! I went with my aged mother for her persistent headache and vertigo. Dr Navalakhe took the time to go through her entire medical history and patiently went through her complaint and records. Also (and this seems rare for experienced doctors these days) he took the time to let her express her symptoms and patiently asked leading questions to ensure he understood her ailment. We were left feeling reassured that he hadn’t missed any piece of the jigsaw puzzle. He’s prescribed a further course of action and follow up in 10 days, which we will do. But well begun is half done, as they say! I unequivocally endorse this Doctor! Shah Milap I would like to recommend him to get exact solution of your ENT problems. He is polite, listens to and understands your problem. And prescribes required medicine. Before visiting him two doctors suggested me nasal operation for sinus but I have visited him for 2nd opinion. He explained to me it's just because of a dust infection and I am absolutely fine. no need to operate..now 3 years passed I am absolutely fine. Thank you doctor. Verified Patient Practo Very happy with the sialoendoscopy treatment done related to narrow salivary ducts by Doctor Milind Navalakhe, he has specialization for this treatment. he was very supportive and comforting during the diagnosis, surgery and post surgery phase. His approach towards diagnosis is very systematic which helped to diagnose the problem properly.  A big thanks to him!! Janmeet Singh (Verified) Practo Contact Us 505, 5th Floor, Rangoli Time Complex, Premiere Cinema Building, Near Parel Bridge, Dr. B.
